item.title: [BHS][Infrastructure] - Electrical Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 18, 16:30 - 22:30 UTC

May 5, 15:17 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Electrical Infrastructure in BHS.

Start time : 18/06/2026 16:30 UTC
End time : 18/06/2026 22:30 UTC
Service impact : None
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in DC.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [PAR][Network] - Backbone maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 17, 19:00 UTC  -  Jun 18, 04:00 UTC

May 6, 19:52 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 17/06/2026 19:00 UTC
End time : 18/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers may experience latency during maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, our teams will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Infrastructure] - Rows WAW0118A/WAW0118B Electrical Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 10, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

May 7, 15:06 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Infrastructure in rows WAW0118A/WAW0118B.

Start time : 10/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : A brief loss of IPMI connectivity may occur. Customers could experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case of their servers.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in WAW1.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [SBG5][Infrastructure] - Rack SBG0504A06C Electrical Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 27, 06:00 - 15:00 UTC

May 5, 13:08 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Electrical Infrastructure in rack SBG0504A06C.

Start time : 27/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in rack SBG0504A06C.

item.title: [WAW1][Cooling System] - Rack WAW0106A05B Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 20, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

May 5, 12:55 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in WAW0106A05B.

Start time : 20/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 20/05/2026 14:00 UTC

Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS][Infrastructure] - Electrical maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 12, 10:30 - 11:30 UTC

Apr 28, 21:26 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Infrastructure.

Start time : 12/05/2026 10:30 UTC
End time : 12/05/2026 11:30 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, some servers in rooms B702 / B703 / B707 / B709 / B710 / B716 may be restarted. In such cases, a temporary unavailability of up to 30 minutes may be experienced.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in BHS.

Thank you for your understanding.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [ERI1][Infrastructure] - Network Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 11, 17:00 - 21:00 UTC

Apr 30, 16:01 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our Network Infrastructure in ERI1.

Start time : 11/05/2026 17:00 UTC
End time : 11/05/2026 21:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, public and private networks might be temporarily unavailable for 20 minutes maximum for the servers in the specified racks:

-E101D03
-ERI0102D02A
-ERI0102D02B
-ERI0102D02C
-ERI0102D03A
-ERI0102D03B
-ERI0102D03C

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our network infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Infrastructure] - Row W12A / B maintenance notification
item.description:
May 11, 11:44 UTC
Completed - We would like to inform you that the maintenance on our Infrastructure is now completed.
All services are operational.

Thank you for your patience throughout this maintenance.

May 11, 06:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 14, 13:50 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Infrastructure.

Start time : 11/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 11/05/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : A brief loss of IPMI connectivity may occur.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in WAW1.

Thank you for your understanding.

May 11, 07:21 UTC

WAW0106B03A
WAW0106B03B
WAW0106B03C
WAW0106B04C
WAW0106B06A
WAW0106B06B
WAW0106B06C

End time : 15/05/2026 06:00 UTC

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in Racks R820R22, R820R24, R821L16 and R823R18.

Thank you for your understanding.
